description: Comprehensive monitoring dashboard for AWS MSK (Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka) clusters using CloudWatch metrics collected via OpenTelemetry.
title: AWS MSK Cluster

var-cluster.name: cluster_name
var-cluster.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'cluster_name') as cluster_name
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name like 'aws_kafka_%'
GROUP BY cluster_name

var-broker.name: broker_id
var-broker.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'broker_id') as broker_id
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name like 'aws_kafka_%'
GROUP BY broker_id

var-environment.name: deployment.environment
var-environment.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment.environment')) as `deployment.environment`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name like 'aws_kafka_%'
GROUP BY `deployment.environment`

widgets.description: Percentage of CPU in user space per broker. High values indicate compute-intensive workloads.
widgets.title: Broker CPU Usage (User)

widgets.description: Percentage of CPU in kernel space per broker.
widgets.title: Broker CPU Usage (System)

widgets.description: Memory in use (bytes) per broker. Monitor for memory pressure.
widgets.title: Broker Memory Usage

widgets.description: Free available memory (bytes) per broker.
widgets.title: Broker Memory Free

widgets.description: Percentage of disk space used for data logs per broker. Alert when approaching capacity.
widgets.title: Broker Disk Usage (Data Logs)

widgets.description: Disk read throughput (bytes) per broker.
widgets.title: Broker Disk Throughput (Read/Write)

widgets.description: Number of network packets received per broker.
widgets.title: Network Traffic In (Packets)

widgets.description: Number of network packets transmitted per broker.
widgets.title: Network Traffic Out (Packets)

widgets.description: Bytes per second received from clients (producers) per broker. Indicates write throughput.
widgets.title: Bytes In Per Second

widgets.description: Bytes per second sent to clients (consumers) per broker. Indicates read throughput.
widgets.title: Bytes Out Per Second

widgets.description: Number of incoming messages per second per broker.
widgets.title: Messages In Per Second

widgets.description: Mean produce time (ms) per broker. Indicates write latency.
widgets.title: Produce Total Time (Mean)

widgets.description: Count of under-replicated partitions per broker. Non-zero values indicate replication issues.
widgets.title: Under-Replicated Partitions

widgets.description: Total number of offline partitions in the cluster. Should always be zero.
widgets.title: Offline Partitions Count

widgets.description: Number of active controllers in the cluster. Only one should be active at any time.
widgets.title: Active Controller Count

widgets.description: Total topic partitions per broker (including replicas).
widgets.title: Partition Count

widgets.description: Total partition leaders per broker. Uneven distribution may indicate load imbalance.
widgets.title: Leader Count

widgets.description: Aggregated offset lag for all partitions in a topic by consumer group.
widgets.title: Consumer Lag (Sum Offset Lag)

widgets.description: Estimated time (seconds) to drain the maximum offset lag per consumer group and topic.
widgets.title: Estimated Max Time Lag

widgets.description: Remaining EBS burst credit balance per broker. Low values may cause throttling.
widgets.title: Burst Balance

widgets.description: CPU credits spent by broker (for burstable instance types like kafka.t3.small).
widgets.title: CPU Credit Usage

widgets.description: Packets shaped (dropped or queued) due to exceeding network allocation limits.
widgets.title: Traffic Shaping

widgets.description: Total active connections (authenticated, unauthenticated, inter-broker) per broker.
widgets.title: Connection Count

widgets.description: Percentage of total heap memory in use after garbage collection per broker.
widgets.title: Heap Memory After GC
